top_signals.title: How Sovereign Wealth Funds Invest in Digital Assets
top_signals.summary: Sovereign wealth funds invest in digital assets mainly through regulated vehicles: spot bitcoin exchange-traded funds (ETFs), publicly traded companies with crypto exposure, blockchain infrastructure firms, and venture capital funds. Direct ownership of bitcoin or other tokens remains uncommon, held back by governance rules, custody requirements, and political accountability. At present, only a small number of […]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Pound Defies Expectations as Traders Give Burnham a Chance
top_signals.summary: In a year of political and economic upheaval for the UK, the pound has emerged as an unlikely oasis of calm, wrong-footing traders who were betting on the currency to retreat at the first sign of trouble.

top_signals.title: Easyjet board reaches agreement over £5.2bn Castlelake takeover
top_signals.summary: The board of Easyjet is poised to accept a takeover bid by private equity firm Castlelake, in a move that could add the airline to a growing list of blue-chip companies that have unveiled plans to quit the London Stock Exchange since the start of the year. The offer of £6.90 per share, the fifth [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
